title: Dining Boulevard
description: More than 200 dining outlets—from chef-driven signatures to fast-casual density—position The Dubai Mall as a culinary destination, not just a shopping trip.

hero.title: Where the world comes to eat
hero.description: Waterfront-adjacent dining, Fashion Avenue adjacency, and aquarium-facing terraces create premium F&B real estate with unmatched footfall.

items.title: Dining Boulevard
items.description: Curated restaurant row with high visibility and tourist capture—ideal for flagship openings and regional firsts.

items.title: Chef Signature Destinations
items.description: Premium full-service restaurants aligned with luxury retail corridors and international visitor expectations.

items.title: Global Cuisine Clusters
items.description: High-density cuisine variety increases dwell time and cross-shopping between retail anchors.

items.title: Cafés & Social Dining
items.description: All-day café culture supports meetings, tourism breaks, and extended stays across the super-mall footprint.
